features.name: Celestial Resistance
features.description: Resistance to Necrotic and Radiant damage.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: 60 feet.

features.name: Healing Hands
features.description: Magic action to heal a creature you touch by d4 per Proficiency Bonus.

features.name: Celestial Revelation
features.description: At level 3, transform for 1 minute (Wings, Shroud, or Radiance).

features.name: Breath Weapon
features.description: Replace one attack with a 15ft cone or 30ft line of energy.

features.name: Draconic Resistance
features.description: Resistance to the damage type associated with your ancestry.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: 60 feet.

features.name: Draconic Flight
features.description: At level 5, gain 10 min of flying speed once per long rest.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: 120 feet.

features.name: Dwarven Resilience
features.description: Advantage on saves against Poison and resistance to Poison damage.

features.name: Dwarven Toughness
features.description: HP increases by 1 each level.

features.name: Stonecunning
features.description: Bonus action to gain Tremorsense (60ft) on stone surfaces for 10 min.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: 60 feet.

features.name: Elven Lineage
features.description: Choose Drow (Spells, Darkvision 120ft), Wood Elf (Speed 35ft, Spells), or High Elf (Spells).

features.name: Fey Ancestry
features.description: Advantage on saves to avoid or end the Charmed condition.

features.name: Keen Senses
features.description: Proficiency in Perception.

features.name: Trance
features.description: 4-hour long rests, remain conscious.

features.name: Firbolg Magic
features.description: You can cast Detect Magic and Disguise Self once per long rest.

features.name: Hidden Step
features.description: Bonus action to turn invisible until start of next turn or you attack/damage.

features.name: Powerful Build
features.description: Count as one size larger for carrying capacity.

features.name: Speech of Beast and Leaf
features.description: Can communicate in a limited manner with beasts and plants.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: 60 feet.

features.name: Gnomish Cunning
features.description: Advantage on INT, WIS, and CHA saves.

features.name: Gnomish Lineage
features.description: Choose Forest Gnome (Minor Illusion) or Rock Gnome (Prestidigitation/Tinkering).

features.name: Large Form
features.description: At level 5, bonus action to become Large for 10 min (Adv on STR saves, +1d6 damage).

features.name: Powerful Build
features.description: Advantage on saves to end Grappled/Restrained. Double carrying capacity.

features.name: Giant Ancestry
features.description: Choose Cloud, Fire, Frost, Hill, Stone, or Storm for specific unique reactions.

features.name: Brave
features.description: Advantage on saves to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

features.name: Halfling Nimbleness
features.description: Move through the space of any creature larger than you.

features.name: Luck
features.description: Reroll a natural 1 on d20 tests.

features.name: Naturally Stealthy
features.description: Hide behind creatures at least one size larger than you.

features.name: Resourceful
features.description: Gain Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest.

features.name: Skill Versatility
features.description: Gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

features.name: Versatile Feat
features.description: Gain one Origin Feat of your choice.

features.name: Expert Duplication
features.description: Advantage on checks to produce copies of objects or documents.

features.name: Kenku Recall
features.description: Give yourself advantage on a skill check you are proficient in (PB times/long rest).

features.name: Mimicry
features.description: Can mimic sounds you have heard, including voices.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: 60 feet.

features.name: Kobold Legacy
features.description: Choose Craftiness (Skill), Defiance (Fear Resistance), or Draconic Sorcery (Cantrip).

features.name: Draconic Cry
features.description: Bonus action to give yourself and allies advantage on attacks against enemies within 10ft.

features.name: Natural Armor
features.description: AC is 13 + DEX modifier if wearing no armor.

features.name: Hungry Jaws
features.description: Bonus action bite attack that gives temporary hit points.

features.name: Nature's Intuition
features.description: Gain proficiency in two nature-related skills.

features.name: Hold Breath
features.description: Can hold breath for up to 15 minutes.

features.name: Adrenaline Rush
features.description: Bonus action to Dash and gain Temporary HP (PB amount).

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: 120 feet.

features.name: Relentless Endurance
features.description: Once per long rest, when reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead.

features.name: Cat's Claws
features.description: Climbing speed of 30ft and unarmed strikes deal 1d6 + STR slashing damage.

features.name: Cat's Talent
features.description: Proficiency in Perception and Stealth.

features.name: Feline Agility
features.description: Double your speed for one turn during combat.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: 60 feet.

features.name: Otherworldly Lineage
features.description: Choose Abyssal (Poison/Vitriol), Chthonic (Necrotic/Wither), or Infernal (Fire/Hell).

features.name: Thaumaturgy
features.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip.
